headline: Top reviewer's share of all reviews is 55% (up vs. baseline)
statement: The rise in this signal most plausibly reflects a change in how the team is handling reviews during this window.

confidence.method: overall = statistical × (0.5 + 0.5 × reasoning) × verdict. Statistical confidence is derived in code from the sample size and reliability of the cited facts; reasoning is the model's own; verdict is the adversarial skeptic's multiplier (supported 1.0 / weak 0.6 / refuted 0.25). Overall is capped by statistical, so the narrative cannot sound more certain than the data — or than the skeptic — allows.
